mapper.select:
select t2.id, t2.task_name, t2.task_code, t2.description, t2.task_type_id, t2.task_type, t2.task_param, t2.definition, t2.version, t2.model_status, t2.publish_status, t2.publish_time, t2.flow_id, t2.creator, t2.create_time FROM ( SELECT t1.id, t1.task_name, t1.task_code, t1.description, t1.task_type_id, t1.task_type, t1.task_param, t1.definition, t1.version, t1.model_status, t1.publish_status, t1.publish_time, t1.flow_id, t1.creator, t1.create_time,row_number() OVER(partition by t1.task_code order by t1.version DESC) AS row_num FROM ingestion_task_definition_log t1 WHERE t1.model_status = 0
) t2 WHERE t2.row_num = 1 ORDER BY t2.create_time DESC LIMIT #{query.size} OFFSET #{query.offset}

SELECT COUNT(0) FROM ( SELECT t1.id, t1.task_name, t1.task_code, t1.description, t1.task_type_id, t1.task_type, t1.task_param, t1.definition, t1.version, t1.model_status, t1.publish_status, t1.publish_time, t1.flow_id, t1.creator, t1.create_time,row_number() OVER(partition by t1.task_code order by t1.version DESC) AS row_num FROM ingestion_task_definition_log t1 WHERE t1.model_status = 0
) t2 WHERE t2.row_num = 1

SELECT t1.id, t1.task_name, t1.task_code, t1.description, t1.task_type_id, t1.task_type, t1.task_param, t1.definition, t1.version, t1.model_status, t1.publish_status, t1.publish_time, t1.flow_id, t1.creator, t1.create_time FROM ingestion_task_definition_log t1 WHERE t1.model_status = 0 AND t1.id IN ( SELECT id FROM ingestion_task_definition_log WHERE model_status = 0 GROUP BY task_code HAVING version = MAX(version) )
ORDER BY t1.create_time DESC

SELECT t1.id, t1.task_name, t1.task_code, t1.description, t1.task_type_id, t1.task_type, t1.task_param, t1.definition, t1.version, t1.model_status, t1.publish_status, t1.publish_time, t1.flow_id, t1.creator, t1.create_time FROM ingestion_task_definition_log t1 WHERE t1.task_code = #{taskCode} AND t1.model_status = 0 ORDER BY t1.version DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE ingestion_task_definition_log SET publish_status = false, publish_time = NULL, updater = 'system', update_time = NOW() WHERE task_code = #{taskCode} AND publish_status = true AND model_status = 0 AND id != #{excludeId}
UPDATE ingestion_task_definition_log SET model_status = 1, updater = 'system', update_time = NOW() WHERE task_code = #{taskCode} AND model_status = 0
mapper.select: SELECT task_code FROM ingestion_task_definition_log WHERE task_code LIKE concat(#{prefix}, '%') ORDER BY task_code DESC LIMIT 1
